question_tagalog: Kung magiging aso ka, anong breed mo and bakit?
question_english: If you were a dog, what breed would you be and why?
quote_tagalog: Kahit anong hayop ka pa, ikaw lang aalagaan ko.
quote_english: Whatever animal you are, I'll only take care of you.

question_tagalog: Pano kung may zombie apocalypse, isasama mo ba ko?
question_english: If there's a zombie apocalypse, would you bring me with you?
quote_tagalog: Ipagtatanggol kita kahit sa zombies pa.
quote_english: I'll protect you even from zombies.

question_tagalog: Anong pinakanakakatawang bagay na ginawa mo sa harap ko?
question_english: What's the funniest thing you've done in front of me?
quote_tagalog: Ang sarap pakinggan ng tawa mo.
quote_english: Your laugh is so good to hear.

question_tagalog: Sino satin yung mas mabilis makatulog kahit saang lugar?
question_english: Who between us falls asleep faster anywhere?
quote_tagalog: Bantayan mo ko kahit tulog ako.
quote_english: Watch over me even when I'm asleep.

question_tagalog: Kung naging magnanakaw tayo, anong una nating nanakawin?
question_english: If we became thieves, what would we steal first?
quote_tagalog: Ninakaw mo na puso ko eh.
quote_english: You already stole my heart anyway.

question_tagalog: Sino ang mas malamang na makalimot ng anniversary natin?
question_english: Who is more likely to forget our anniversary?
quote_tagalog: Basta araw-araw anniversary natin.
quote_english: As long as every day is our anniversary.

question_tagalog: Kung mapupunta tayo sa deserted island, anong tatlong bagay dadalhin natin?
question_english: If we end up on a deserted island, what three things would we bring?
quote_tagalog: Sapat na sakin na andon ka.
quote_english: It's enough for me that you're there.

question_tagalog: Sino satin ang mas malakas kumain pag may libre?
question_english: Who between us eats more when it's free?
quote_tagalog: Libre man o hindi, ikaw pipiliin ko.
quote_english: Free or not, I'll choose you.

question_tagalog: Kung magiging meme ako, anong meme yun?
question_english: If I were a meme, what meme would I be?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang nagpapatawa sakin ng ganito.
quote_english: Only you make me laugh like this.

question_tagalog: Pano kung naging ipis ako, papatayin mo ba ko?
question_english: What if I became a cockroach, would you kill me?
quote_tagalog: Hindi, tatabihan pa rin kita matulog.
quote_english: No, I'd still sleep beside you.

question_tagalog: Kaya mo bang wag tumawa ng isang buong araw?
question_english: Can you handle not laughing for a whole day?
quote_tagalog: Ang hirap magseryoso pag kasama ka.
quote_english: It's hard to be serious when I'm with you.

question_tagalog: Sino yung unang umiiyak pag nanonood ng sad movie?
question_english: Who cries first when watching a sad movie?
quote_tagalog: Pupunasan ko palagi luha mo.
quote_english: I'll always wipe your tears.

question_tagalog: Pano kung tumaba ako bigla, magbabago ba tingin mo?
question_english: What if I suddenly gain weight, will your view change?
quote_tagalog: Mas marami lang akong pwedeng yakapin.
quote_english: I just have more of you to hug.

question_tagalog: Kung superhero movie tayo, ano ang powers ko?
question_english: If we were a superhero movie, what are my powers?
quote_tagalog: Power mo yung napapasaya ako instantly.
quote_english: Your power is making me happy instantly.

question_tagalog: Sino satin yung sobrang tagal maligo?
question_english: Who between us takes too long taking a bath?
quote_tagalog: Hihintayin kita kahit gano pa katagal.
quote_english: I'll wait for you no matter how long.

question_tagalog: Kung pinanganak tayong kabayo, karera ba tayo araw-araw?
question_english: If we were born horses, would we race every day?
quote_tagalog: Kahit kabayo tayo, ikaw lang paborito ko.
quote_english: Even if we were horses, you're my favorite.

question_tagalog: Kaya mo bang tignan yung mukha ko na naka-pout ng 1 minute?
question_english: Can you handle looking at my pouting face for 1 min?
quote_tagalog: Wag mo kong hamunin, kikiligin ako.
quote_english: Don't challenge me, I'll get butterflies.

question_tagalog: Kung magswi-switch tayo ng katawan for a day, ano unang gagawin mo?
question_english: If we switch bodies for a day, what's the first thing you'll do?
quote_tagalog: Iba pa rin pag ikaw nasa sarili mong katawan.
quote_english: It's still different when you're in your own body.

question_tagalog: Sino satin ang mas malakas mag-overthink pag hatinggabi?
question_english: Who overthinks more at midnight?
quote_tagalog: Samahan kitang magpuyat gabi-gabi.
quote_english: I'll stay up late with you every night.

question_tagalog: Pano kung naging manok ako, ipiprito mo ba ko?
question_english: What if I became a chicken, would you fry me?
quote_tagalog: Di ko kaya kainin ang love of my life.
quote_english: I can't eat the love of my life.

question_tagalog: Kung parehas tayong naligaw, ibablame mo ba ko agad?
question_english: If we both get lost, will you blame me instantly?
quote_tagalog: Magkasama tayong nawawala, ayos lang.
quote_english: We're lost together, it's fine.

question_tagalog: Anong paborito mong kanta ko sa karaoke kahit sintunado?
question_english: What's your favorite song of mine in karaoke even if out of tune?
quote_tagalog: Kahit asintunado ka, perpekto ka parin sakin.
quote_english: Even if you're out of tune, you're still perfect to me.

question_tagalog: Sino mas maarte satin dalawa pagdating sa pagkain?
question_english: Who is pickier between us when it comes to food?
quote_tagalog: Lahat ng luto mo, masarap para sakin.
quote_english: Everything you cook is delicious to me.

question_tagalog: Kaya mo bang pigilan tawa mo pag nagpapatawa ko ng seryoso?
question_english: Can you hold your laugh when I try to be funny seriously?
quote_tagalog: Mabenta ka sakin kahit corny.
quote_english: You still sell to me even if it's corny.

question_tagalog: Saan tayo unang tatakbo pag nagka-alien invasion?
question_english: Where will we run first if there's an alien invasion?
quote_tagalog: Kahit san tayo pumunta, protektado kita.
quote_english: Wherever we go, I'll protect you.

question_tagalog: Pano kung kalbo ako, liligawan mo pa rin ba ako?
question_english: What if I were bald, would you still court me?
quote_tagalog: Kahit walang buhok, ang ganda mo parin.
quote_english: Even without hair, you're still beautiful.

question_tagalog: Kung magsasabunutan tayo ngayon, sino unang iiyak?
question_english: If we pull each other's hair now, who will cry first?
quote_tagalog: Di ko kayang masaktan ka.
quote_english: I can't bear to see you hurt.

question_tagalog: Anong nakakairitang habit ko na secretly cute for you?
question_english: What annoying habit of mine is secretly cute for you?
quote_tagalog: Pati habit mo mahal ko narin.
quote_english: I've come to love your habits too.

question_tagalog: Kung kailangan mong mag-rap para ma-impress ako, anong kanta?
question_english: If you had to rap to impress me, what song?
quote_tagalog: Gagawin ko lahat mapa-smile lang kita.
quote_english: I'll do anything just to make you smile.

question_tagalog: Sino nag-iimbento ng mga weird nicknames satin?
question_english: Who invents the weird nicknames between us?
quote_tagalog: Kahit anong itawag mo sakin, kikiligin ako.
quote_english: Whatever you call me, I'll still get butterflies.

question_tagalog: Kung mananalo tayo sa lotto, anong kalokohan bibilhin natin?
question_english: If we win the lottery, what nonsense will we buy?
quote_tagalog: Kahit wala ng pera, basta kasama ka.
quote_english: Even without money, as long as I have you.

question_tagalog: Sino satin ang mas malakas mag-snore pag pagod na pagod?
question_english: Who snores louder between us when exhausted?
quote_tagalog: Music to my ears yung hilik mo minsan.
Your snores are music to my ears sometimes.

question_tagalog: Kung pwede mong i-erase ang isang memory sa utak ko, ano yun?
question_english: If you could erase one memory from my mind, what would it be?
quote_tagalog: Lahat ng memories natin, treasure sakin.
quote_english: All our memories are treasures to me.

question_tagalog: Kung magiging alien ako asawa mo parin ba ako?
question_english: If I became an alien, would I still be your spouse?
quote_tagalog: Hanggang galaxy, ikaw pa rin.
quote_english: Even till the galaxy, it's still you.

question_tagalog: Pano kung amoy sibuyas ako araw-araw, yakap pa rin ba?
question_english: What if I smelled like onions every day, still hugging?
quote_tagalog: Haharapin ko lahat ng amoy para sayo.
quote_english: I'll face any smell just for you.

question_tagalog: Sino mas marami laging picture sa cellphone?
question_english: Who always has more pictures on their phone?
quote_tagalog: Puno ng mukha mo yung gallery ko.
quote_english: My gallery is full of your face.

question_tagalog: Pano kung makalimutan kong pangalan mo, anong itatawag mo sakin?
question_english: What if I forget your name, what would you call me?
quote_tagalog: Basta alam ng puso ko na ikaw yan.
quote_english: As long as my heart knows it's you.

question_tagalog: Kung inimbento ko yung sayaw sa Tiktok, gagawin mo ba with me?
question_english: If I invented a dance on Tiktok, would you do it with me?
quote_tagalog: Para sayo makiki-uso ako.
quote_english: For you, I will ride the trend.

question_tagalog: Sino satin ang mas clumsy maglakad sa patag?
question_english: Who is clumsier walking on flat ground?
quote_tagalog: Sasaluhin kita palagi pag nahuhulog ka.
quote_english: I'll always catch you when you fall.

question_tagalog: Kung naging kamatis ako, kakainin mo ba ko sa salad?
question_english: If I became a tomato, would you eat me in a salad?
quote_tagalog: Hindi, ipaglalaban ko ang kamatis kong mahal.
quote_english: No, I'll fight for my beloved tomato.

question_tagalog: Aminin mo, ilang beses ka tumingin sa salamin today?
question_english: Admit it, how many times did you look in the mirror today?
quote_tagalog: Gusto ko maging pogi/ganda lagi sa paningin mo.
quote_english: I want to always look handsome/beautiful to your eyes.

question_tagalog: Pano kung palagi kong isinisingit pangalan mo sa kanta?
question_english: What if I always insert your name in a song?
quote_tagalog: Paborito ko naririnig pangalan ko mula sayo.
quote_english: My favorite is hearing my name from you.

question_tagalog: Sino ang mas nagmamaganda pag may group picture?
question_english: Who acts prettily more in group pictures?
quote_tagalog: Wala nang gaganda sayo sa paningin ko.
quote_english: Nothing is more beautiful than you in my eyes.

question_tagalog: Kung comedy movie buhay natin, sinong main character?
question_english: If our life was a comedy movie, who's the main character?
quote_tagalog: Partner in crime forever.
quote_english: Partner in crime forever.

question_tagalog: Pano mo ko binubwisit pag bored ka?
question_english: How do you annoy me when you're bored?
quote_tagalog: Napapasaya mo pa rin ako kahit nabubwisit ako.
quote_english: You still make me happy even when I'm annoyed.

question_tagalog: Sino satin laging nakakalimot mag-flush ng toilet?
question_english: Who between us always forgets to flush the toilet?
quote_tagalog: Kahit medyo burara ka, love parin kita.
quote_english: Even if you're a bit messy, I still love you.

question_tagalog: Payag ka bang parehas lang damit natin everyday for a year?
question_english: Would you agree wearing the same clothes everyday for a year?
quote_tagalog: Kung matching tayo palagi, bakit hindi.
quote_english: If we always match, why not.

question_tagalog: Kung ang halik ay pwedeng amoy ulam, anong ulam gusto mo?
question_english: If kisses could smell like food, what food would you choose?
quote_tagalog: Amoy lechon man yan, iki-kiss pa rin kita.
quote_english: Even if it smells like lechon, I'll still kiss you.

question_tagalog: Ano ang reaksyon mo pag umutot ako nang malakas?
question_english: What's your reaction when I fart loudly?
quote_tagalog: Normal lang yan, tao rin tayo eh.
quote_english: That's just normal, we're human too.

question_tagalog: Sino ang laging the 'funny one' sa tropa, ikaw o ako?
question_english: Who is always the 'funny one' in the group, you or me?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw talaga ang the best comedian ko.
quote_english: You're really my best comedian.

question_tagalog: Pano kung asarin kita buong araw, magagalit ka ba talaga?
question_english: What if I tease you all day, will you really get mad?
quote_tagalog: Hindi kita matiis, ikaw nagpapangiti sakin eh.
quote_english: I can't resist you, you make me smile.

question_tagalog: Naranasan mo na ba matawa sakin kahit seryoso ako?
question_english: Have you ever laughed at me when I was being serious?
quote_tagalog: Cute mo kasing seryosohin.
quote_english: It's cute taking you seriously.

question_tagalog: Sino sa atin mas mabilis ma-distract sa TikTok?
question_english: Who gets distracted faster on TikTok?
quote_tagalog: I-uninstall natin yan, baka mababawasan time mo sakin.
quote_english: Let's uninstall that, it might lessen your time for me.

question_tagalog: Kung isasabuhay mo yung emoji na '🤪', kaya mo ba always?
question_english: If you embodied the emoji '🤪', could you do it always?
quote_tagalog: Ang saya kaya pag puro kalokohan kasama ka.
quote_english: It's so fun when it's all goofing around with you.

question_tagalog: Kung may title song yung katangahan mo, anong kanta yun?
question_english: If your clumsiness had a title song, what would it be?
quote_tagalog: Ako na lang always savior mo.
quote_english: I'll just always be your savior.

question_tagalog: Sino mas madalas mag-send ng weird links sa chat?
question_english: Who sends weird links more often in chat?
quote_tagalog: Lahat ng ise-send mo, iki-click ko parin.
quote_english: Everything you send, I'll still click.

question_tagalog: Pano ko ma-pa-panic kung pinalitan ko shampoo mo ng sabong panlaba?
question_english: How would you panic if I replaced your shampoo with laundry detergent?
quote_tagalog: Ang mahalaga, mabango pa rin ako sayo.
quote_english: What's important is I'm still fragrant to you.

question_tagalog: Sino mas marunong humanap ng palusot pag nagkasala?
question_english: Who is better at finding excuses when at fault?
quote_tagalog: Papatawarin din kita agad kahit ano excuse mo.
quote_english: I'll forgive you right away whatever your excuse is.

question_tagalog: Anong joke ko ang napa-isip ka talaga kung tanga ba ako?
question_english: Which of my jokes made you really ponder if I'm dumb?
quote_tagalog: Tanggap kita kahit corny ka mag-joke.
quote_english: I accept you even if your jokes are corny.

question_tagalog: Kung araw-araw tayong nagpeprankhan, sinong susuko?
question_english: If we pranks each other every day, who'd give up?
quote_tagalog: Hindi ako magsasawa sa mga tawa natin dalawa.
quote_english: I'll never get tired of our laughs together.
